title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Microsoft India South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Microsoft India South Asia Partners:
Microsoft India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India South Asia Partners!
